claim: Cross-check confirms: YOLO demand evidence dispatch implements harness boundary audit with SHA-256 snapshot diffs, violation blocker injection, and PRD readiness blocking. All explorer claims verified via independent file reads.

evidence.summary: fileDigest (SHA-256) and buildBoundarySnapshot independently confirmed: creates file digest Map, excludes allowed roots via isWithin check
evidence.why: Verifies explorer claim about baseline snapshot mechanism

evidence.summary: diffBoundarySnapshots independently confirmed: iterates before/after Maps, detects added/modified/deleted files
evidence.why: Verifies explorer claim about change detection logic

evidence.summary: runDemandEvidenceDispatchRuntime boundary snapshot sequence confirmed: before snapshot at 514, after at 564, diff at 565, result object at 566-570
evidence.why: Verifies explorer claim about snapshot timing and violation detection integration

evidence.summary: Boundary blocker injection confirmed: lines 583-588 map changes to BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION blockers, lines 589-595 merge into readiness and force prd_ready=false
evidence.why: Verifies explorer claim that violations block PRD readiness

evidence.summary: sanitizeMissing independently confirmed: isNonMissingStatusItem patterns at 132-140, filter logic at 142-148 removes status phrases
evidence.why: Verifies explorer claim about false-positive prevention

evidence.summary: evidenceScopeErrors independently confirmed: checks VALID_EVIDENCE_SCOPES set, returns error messages for invalid scope declarations
evidence.why: Verifies explorer claim about scope validation enforcement

evidence.summary: DEMAND_EVIDENCE_AGENT_PROTOCOLS independently confirmed: explorer, cross_checker, verifier all define writes_code: false with specific objectives
evidence.why: Verifies explorer claim about evidence agent contracts

evidence.summary: Evidence validation functions independently confirmed: evidenceResultBlockingIssues at 481-511, projectEvidenceBlockingIssues at 513-530 check missing/blocked recommendations and project path requirements
evidence.why: Verifies explorer claim about router evidence validation

evidence.summary: inspectDemandPrdReadiness evidence agent loop at 709-727 confirmed: checks requiredEvidenceRoles, calls evidenceResultComplete, adds scope and project evidence blockers
evidence.why: Verifies explorer claim about PRD readiness inspection

evidence.summary: spawnProviderPrompt independently confirmed: spawns claude/codex/custom processes, handles timeout via timer at 150-170, captures stdout/stderr, returns timedOut flag
evidence.why: Verifies explorer claim about provider execution with timeouts

evidence.summary: execution_policy boundary configuration independently confirmed: project_mutation forbidden, allowed_write_roots specifies output_dir
evidence.why: Verifies explorer claim about documented boundary constraints

risks: Boundary snapshot exclusion logic relies on isWithin resolution; symbolic links or absolute path mis-matches could allow undetected writes
gitFiles fallback to walkFiles could miss untracked files that git ignores but exist on disk
SHA-256 digest collision (theoretically possible but practically impossible)

result.notes: All explorer claims independently verified via direct file reads. Cross-check found no contradictions. Boundary audit implementation matches explorer description: SHA-256 snapshots, diff detection, blocker injection, and PRD readiness blocking are all implemented as claimed.
